name: Form 11 — Self-Assessed Income Tax
description: Context for translating SAS programs related to Form 11 self-assessed income tax processing. Covers income lines, liabilities, and reference tax-rate tables.

tableMappings.notes: All Form 11 tables live in the form11 Hive schema

columns.name: ppsn
columns.description: Personal Public Service Number — primary identifier

columns.name: tax_year_short
columns.description: Tax year as 2-digit integer e.g. 23 for 2023

columns.name: income_type
columns.description: Category code: PAYE, SELF, RENT, DIV, etc.

businessRules: Deduplication on ppsn should always use tax_year_short as a secondary sort key
tax_year_short values prior to 10 represent years 2010 onwards (2-digit year)
gross_income can be NULL for exempt income types — treat NULL as 0 in aggregations
The form11.income_lines table is partitioned by tax_year_short — always include it in WHERE for performance
promptNotes: This is internal Revenue Commissioners data. Never suggest external table names or schemas not listed above.
